# Category: location
# Jurisdiction: global (country-aware precision reduction)
#
# Shape-aware across UK (keep outward code), US 5-digit ZIP (keep first
# 3), and Canada (keep FSA); other shapes fail closed. Example: SW1A 2AA
# → SW1A ***.
